about.label: About Us
about.title: Experts in Australia & the Pacific
about.text: We are a team of passionate travellers based in Brisbane, dedicated to creating bespoke itineraries across Australia, New Zealand, and the Pacific Islands. Every journey is born from direct knowledge of the land — and deep respect for it: we design authentic, sustainable experiences, so these wonders remain for generations to come.

itineraries.subtitle: These itineraries are our travel proposals: starting points that we build and adapt to your needs, travel style and available time. No fixed packages — every journey is designed around you.
itineraries.note: We also organise fully private tours, tailored to you — no group departures.

howItWorksPage.heroSubtitle: A transparent, guided process designed to get you travelling without worries. No call centres, no bots — just experts with first-hand knowledge of the destination.
howItWorksPage.stepsSubtitle: From your first enquiry to your return home, we are with you every step of the way.

0.title: Fill in the guided form
0.description: Start with our smart questionnaire: we ask about your destination, dates, number of travellers and travel style. It takes less than 3 minutes.
0.detail: You can choose a single destination or combine multiple stops (e.g. Australia + New Zealand + Fiji). You can also tell us if it's a honeymoon, a family trip or a special occasion — this helps us suggest the most fitting experiences.
0.b2: Choose your travel style (luxury, adventure, family, etc.)

1.title: Our team reviews your request
1.description: Your profile goes directly to one of our destination specialists, assigned based on your chosen destination. No call centre, no bots — real people with first-hand knowledge of the territory.
1.detail: We typically reply within 24 business hours with an initial assessment. We may ask for a few more details to refine the proposal, via email or a call.
1.b2: Dedicated expert for each destination (Australia, NZ, Fiji, etc.)
1.b3: Team based in Australia: direct local knowledge

2.title: Receive your tailor-made quote
2.description: We put together a detailed proposal with hand-picked accommodation, transport, experiences and excursions chosen specifically for you — not off-the-shelf packages.
2.detail: The quote includes a clear breakdown of all costs, available personalisation options and practical tips for each stop. You can request changes free of charge until approval.
2.b1: Day-by-day itinerary with accommodation and transport

3.title: You confirm, we handle everything
3.description: Once you approve the quote, we manage all bookings: flights (if required), hotels, transfers, car hire, insurance and activities. You don't have to lift a finger.
3.detail: You'll receive a complete travel dossier before departure, with all the details, useful contacts, instructions for each stop and local tips from our team.
3.b1: Full management of flights, hotels, transfers and activities
3.b3: Useful contacts and emergency numbers for each destination

4.title: Support throughout your trip
4.description: During your trip you have a direct line to our team on the ground. If anything unexpected comes up, we step in straight away.
4.detail: We're based in Australia: compatible time zone with Oceania, direct knowledge of the territory.
4.b1: Direct line to our team in Australia
4.b2: On-the-ground support for any unexpected events
4.b3: Compatible time zone: we respond when you need us

0.title: Years of experience
0.desc: Since 2008 we have been organising tailor-made trips to Australia and the Pacific for Italian travellers.

1.title: Happy travellers
1.desc: Families, honeymooning couples, groups of friends: every journey is unique.

2.title: Destinations covered
2.desc: Australia, New Zealand, Fiji, Cook Islands, Samoa and New Caledonia.

0.q: How far in advance should I get in touch?
0.a: We recommend contacting us at least 3-4 months before departure for standard trips, and 6-12 months ahead for peak seasons (Christmas, Easter, European summer). That said, we can often organise trips at shorter notice — get in touch and we'll see what's possible.

1.a: The initial consultation and preparation of your quote are completely free and with no obligation. Our fees are included in the final package, with no hidden surprises.

2.q: What happens if I need to change or cancel my trip?
2.a: We manage all changes directly with suppliers. Cancellation policies vary depending on the services booked, but we always inform you transparently before you confirm. We always recommend taking out appropriate travel insurance.

3.q: Can you organise just part of the trip (e.g. hotels only)?
3.a: Yes, we can handle individual elements of a trip or the complete package. Many clients ask us to manage only their accommodation or local experiences, while they sort out flights independently.

4.a: Absolutely. Many of our itineraries combine Australia, New Zealand, Fiji and other Pacific islands in a single trip. We help you build the most efficient route based on your time and budget.

5.a: We typically require a deposit upon booking confirmation and the balance 60-90 days before departure. Exact details depend on the services booked and are always communicated transparently before any commitment.
